evidence_summary: Establish the transition of Carter from a combatant to a settled commander by documenting the physical accumulation of resources and the organization of Tharkian servants within his new quarters.

Carter receives his spoils of war—weapons, silks, furs, and food—delivered by the retinues of the chieftains he defeated. He organizes these people into a functional unit to manage his new quarters, effectively setting up his command center.
From chaos/arrival to organized authority and domestic establishment.

Organized, cluttered room functioning as a command center with established servants.
Carter directs the delivery and organization of spoils to establish his quarters.
